creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
After updating DISTVERSION to 0.40.0 and 'make makesum' the extract phase fails:

> go: github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify@v1.5.4: missing go.sum entry; to add it:
>         go mod download github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify
> go: github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify@v1.5.4: missing go.sum entry; to add it:
>         go mod download github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify
> *** Error code 1
